{| class="wikitable"
! Type
! style="white-space: nowrap;" | Date
! Summary
|-
| style="color:white; background:#ff9500;" | '''New'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 12/13/2017 9:03
| Added support for vc_static and vc_methodology_lp (VCLP);  vclp_build and vclp_test simbuild stages added @fast(vclp)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#ff9500;" | '''New'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 12/13/2017 3:41
| Added sglint_gui and sgcdc_gui stages to start debug with the proper SG versions @fast(sglint/sgcdc)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#ff9500;" | '''New'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 12/13/2017 18:05
| Added vclp_gui stage for interactive debug @fast(vclp)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#ff9500;" | '''New'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 12/12/2017 17:56
| "Plumbed in ToolContour support for ""HDK_REL"" facet. @vertical(tsa)"
|-
| style="color:white; background:#ff9500;" | '''New'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 11/30/2017 7:46
| Enabled sglint/sgcdc ace_command to use two new OPT_SPEC parameters instead of forcing designer to add ASSIGN calls at command line @vertical(tsa)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#ff9500;" | '''New'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 11/30/2017 7:28
| Enabled simbuild command line options for sglint and sgcdc stages to override ace static check cfg file and results directory @vertical(tsa)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#ff9500;" | '''New'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 11/28/2017 6:40
| Added pre/post/setup for SGCDC in Flowspec definition @fast(sgcdc)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#ff9500;" | '''New'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 11/27/2017 15:24
| Added tsa_shell support for Spyglass CDC methodology (in place of osetup). @fast(sgcdc)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#ff9500;" | '''New'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 11/16/2017 7:14
| Enhanced SetupMaker with spyglass lint hook in tsa_shell.env to switch spyglass version at runtime. @fast(sglint)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#ff9500;" | '''New'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 11/16/2017 6:57
| Added hooks for 1713plus import based on TSA release naming convention (1713plus.YYwwWW[a-f]). Import file name is CommonToolOVR_m1713plus.pm. @vertical(tsa)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#ff9500;" | '''New'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 11/16/2017 6:32
| Added Spyglass CDC and Lint 1.4.9 tool data to 1713plus .pm import @fast(sglint/sgcdc)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#ff9500;" | '''New'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 11/16/2017 6:25
| Spyglass lint sglint_compile and sglint_test stages added to FlowSpec. @fast(sglint)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#3399ff;" | '''Improved'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 12/4/2017 13:15
| Upgraded spyglass_cdc version to 1.00.16 and dependent spyglass version to L2016.06-SP2-8-B4_Sept1 @fast(sgcdc)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#3399ff;" | '''Improved'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 12/4/2017 13:12
| Added spyglass to tsetup version autopopulate to automatically add new releases to the sitedef @vertical(tsa)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#3399ff;" | '''Improved'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 12/15/2017 0:45
| Backed out gkutils for setting overrides tracking @vertical(tsa)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#3399ff;" | '''Improved'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 12/14/2017 23:56
| Added overrides tracking support when ACTIVE_EXEC is gkutils or gk-utils;  some legacy repos will have this setting instead of simbuild or febe during turnin @vertical(tsa)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#3399ff;" | '''Improved'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 12/13/2017 18:04
| Upgraded vc_methodology_lp version from 1.00.08.17ww47 to 1.00.09.17ww50 @fast(vclp)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#3399ff;" | '''Improved'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 12/13/2017 18:03
| Changed simbuild stage environment flag to match febe name VC_STATIC_LP @fast(vclp)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#3399ff;" | '''Improved'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 12/13/2017 10:34
| Altered sgcdc_gui stage to launch spyglass only without test run. Requires .prj file as input. @fast(sgcdc)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#3399ff;" | '''Improved'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 12/1/2017 7:45
| Upgraded version of spyglass_lint methodology to 1.04.11.17ww48
|-
| style="color:white; background:#3399ff;" | '''Improved'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 12/1/2017 7:41
| "Changed lint and cdc ""_compile"" stage names to ""_build"" to match febe side vclp terminology"
|-
| style="color:white; background:#3399ff;" | '''Improved'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 11/30/2017 7:51
| Added CDC spyglass version to list of possible tsetup versions @vertical(tsa)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#3399ff;" | '''Improved'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 11/27/2017 8:58
| Upgraded spyglass_lint version to 1.04.06.17ww47;  supporting Exact Match Spyglass version upgraded to M2017.03-SP2-2 @fast(sglint)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#3399ff;" | '''Improved'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 11/27/2017 15:04
| Upgraded spyglass_lint methodology version to 1.04.07.17ww48
|-
| style="color:white; background:#3399ff;" | '''Improved'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 11/16/2017 7:34
| Upgraded spyglass_lint version to 1.04.04.17ww46 @fast(sglint)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#3399ff;" | '''Improved'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 11/16/2017 7:34
| Added REAL_MODEL_ROOT for sglint mode to handle problem where MODEL_ROOT was being unexpectly switched by the designer dynamically to aceroot @fast(sglint)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#3399ff;" | '''Improved'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 11/16/2017 7:07
| Upgraded onecfg version to 1.02.08 @vertical(tsa)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#3399ff;" | '''Improved'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 11/16/2017 6:44
| Set all repo overrides to information only in log files. @vertical(tsa) @hsd(https://hsdes.intel.com/resource/22091656)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#3399ff;" | '''Improved'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 11/16/2017 6:35
| Enhanced sub print_file to generate before and after snapshots if the file compare fails. For debug trace. @vertical(tsa) @hsd(https://hsdes.intel.com/appstore/article/#/1406452023) @hsd(https://hsdes.intel.com/resource/1406243868)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#00b300;" | '''Fixed'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 12/17/2017 12:59
| "Added UpdateFEBETable_m1713plus.pm with VisaAudit update removed, incompatible with new febe version required for vclp @vertical(tsa)"
|-
| style="color:white; background:#00b300;" | '''Fixed'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 12/14/2017 23:58
| Generate snapshot common snap file for either 1713 or 1713 plus.  Not needed as a debug tool. @vertical(tsa)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#00b300;" | '''Fixed'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 12/14/2017 19:10
| "Removed tsa_shell sort from all ARRAY refs used to build tsa_shell.env,  ordering is deterministic even with hash_merge @vertical(tsa)"
|-
| style="color:white; background:#00b300;" | '''Fixed'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 12/14/2017 17:45
| Removed explicit sort of tsa_shell setenv calls to preserve original ordering.  LocalToolData hash merge will preserve array ordering.  @vertical(tsa)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#00b300;" | '''Fixed'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 12/14/2017 17:19
| Disabled snapshot checker function to eliminate possible reading of snap file with open filehandle @vertical(tsa)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#00b300;" | '''Fixed'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 12/14/2017 16:33
| Locked SnapShotChecker to Perl 5.8.5 to avoid regex stringification issue between 5.8.5 and 5.14.1 @vertical(tsa)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#00b300;" | '''Fixed'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 12/13/2017 18:21
| Set sgcdc_prj_file default to empty string to make the flag optional for other stages @vertical(tsa)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#00b300;" | '''Fixed'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 12/12/2017 18:55
| Added HDK_REL support to log prefix @vertical(tsa)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#00b300;" | '''Fixed'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 12/1/2017 8:36
| Fixed SPYGLASS_DC_PATH to be set to path instead of version
|-
| style="color:white; background:#00b300;" | '''Fixed'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 11/30/2017 9:26
| Upgraded version of spyglass_lint methodology to 1.04.09.17ww48
|-
| style="color:white; background:#00b300;" | '''Fixed'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 11/30/2017 7:44
| Exposed additional 3 switches to simbuild @vertical(tsa)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#00b300;" | '''Fixed'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 11/30/2017 7:18
| Moved 1713plus bypass in tsa_shell to after environment section but before custom_post setup to allow code to setup spyglass in legacy mode. @vertical(tsa)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#00b300;" | '''Fixed'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 11/28/2017 6:55
| Added ASSIGN flag back in for all sglint and sgcdc ace calls @fast(sglint/sgcdc)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#00b300;" | '''Fixed'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 11/27/2017 11:24
| Allow TSA version name to match to (\d{4})(plus)?\.\d+ww\d+\w.* in order to add suffix for trial versions @vertical(tsa)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#00b300;" | '''Fixed'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 11/16/2017 7:23
| Fixed incorrect pointer to ace_static_check.cfg @vertical(tsa)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#00b300;" | '''Fixed'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 11/16/2017 7:10
| Enhanced Setupmaker to sorted contents of tsa_shell.env to be deterministic. SLES11P4 patch resulted in random reordering of file contents and undesired file rewrites during massively parallel GK runs. @vertical(tsa) @hsd(https://hsdes.intel.com/appstore/article/#/1406452023) @hsd(https://hsdes.intel.com/resource/1406243868)
|-
| style="color:white; background:#00b300;" | '''Fixed'''
| style="white-space: nowrap;" | 11/14/2017 11:52
| Uncoupled perl version for SetupMaker and SnapshotChecker; Added hook in SnapshotChecker to list Perl version @vertical(tsa) @hsd(https://hsdes.intel.com/appstore/article/#/1406389486)
|-
|}
